title: How Intuit, DoorDash, and Atlassian are adopting AI coding
summary: Engineering leaders from Intuit, DoorDash, and Atlassian discuss their AI coding tool adoption strategies, workflow changes, and productivity measurement approaches. They share findings that engineers spend significant time on non-coding tasks and report substantial timeline acceleration when deploying AI-assisted development practices.
